parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM holdings WHERE net_quantity > 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM alerts WHERE status = 'active'

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 600, system: 'You are a financial news sentiment analyzer for Indian stocks. Analyze the news articles and score sentiment for each stock mentioned. Return ONLY valid JSON array: [{ "symbol": "STOCKNAME", "sentiment_score": -100 to +100, "key_headline": "most impactful headline", "impact": "brief description", "confidence": 0 to 1 }]. Scoring: -100 to -60 very negative (fraud/crash), -60 to -20 negative (miss/downgrade), -20 to +20 neutral, +20 to +60 positive (beat/upgrade), +60 to +100 very positive (breakthrough/deal).', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyze sentiment for these stocks: ' + $('Add NIFTY to List').first().json.symbols.join(', ') + '

News articles:
' + ($input.first().json.articles || []).slice(0, 15).map(a => a.title + ' - ' + a.description).join('
') }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO staging_data (data_date, data_type, data) VALUES ($1, 'options_news', $2) ON CONFLICT (data_date, data_type, symbol) DO UPDATE SET data = $2, updated_at = NOW()
